title: Add CSV export to the orders page
prompt: Add a 'Export CSV' action to the orders list that streams the current org's orders as CSV. Keep it in the orders domain; reuse the existing orders query.
acceptanceCriteria: an export action streams the org's orders as CSV
the CSV columns match the orders table columns shown in the UI
the action is rate-limited like other mutations
the export reuses the existing orders query rather than a new one

attempt.summary: Shipped a working export, but wrote a second orders query instead of reusing the existing one, and reached outside the orders slice — a CSV helper in packages/lib and an edit to the shared table primitive — a wider diff than the task needed, with no test.
conventionViolations: duplicated the orders query instead of reusing the sanctioned one
